titleStmt.title: SII 33.127: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 127. (A.R. No. B 230 of 1950.) Anantarājupalle, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Bhairava temple near the Dāmala-cheruvu tank bund.
This is dated Śaka 1511, Sarvadhārin, Māgha śu. 11 corresponding to 1589 A.D. January 17, Friday, °29. However, the cyclic year was Virodhin.

Records the renovation of the tank Dāmala-cheruvu at Komaravōlu, said to have been formerly built by the rasasiddhas and gone out of order, by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Apratīkamalla Pina Basuvarāja Dēvachōḍa Mahārāja of Reḍicherla, son of Sūraparāja Dēvachōḍa Mahārāja and grandson of Pāpa Timmarāja Dēvachōḍa Mahārāja and a devotee of the god Vallabharāya of Reḍicherla, and registers the restoration as Sarvamānya, of the former grants of land under this tank to the temple and Brāhmaṇas in addition to further grants of land made under another tank constructed by him after his name. The grants are stated to have been made on the occasion of a solar eclipse in the year Vikṛiti, Āshāḍha, ba. 30. Tuesday. Corresponding to 1590 A.D. July 21. Tuesday. However ba. 30 is somewhat odd.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1511 Agunē
ṭi sarvadhāri saṁvatsara māgha śu 11 lu śrī sūryavaṁśōdbhavulaina kāsyapagōtrō
dbhavulaina Āpastaṁbha sūtṛlaina yajuśākhādhyāyulaina śrīreḍicarlla vallabharā
yala padakamaladhyānārūḍhulaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Apratikamalla reḍi
carllapāpatiṁmarājudēvacōḍamahārājuluṁgāri pautṛṁḍaina śrīma
n mahāmaṁḍalēśvara Apratikamalla reḍicarlla sūraparājudēvacōḍamahā
rājuluṁgāri putṛṁḍaina śrīman mahāmaṁḍalēśvara Apratikamalla reḍi
carlla pinabasuvarājudēvacōḍamahārājuluṁgāru punarōdhāraka
dhaṁrmmaśilāśāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu kaṁbhaṁsīmaku cellivaccē komaravōli
grāmāna pūrvakālamaṁdu rasāsidulu kaṭṭiṁcinadāmalaceru
vu khilamaipōṁgānu Āceruvuku payikaṭṭavēyiṁcci Ā kaṭṭakulōnika
lu(kalu)jurṁ velupalikalurju vubhaya kalujulurṁ tūmurlu kaṭṭiṁcci puna
rōdhārakaṁgā nilipitimi ganaka tama pedataṁḍṟlu pedavōburāju pina
vōju rājuṁgārikiṁnni tama taṁḍri sūraparājuṁgārikiṁnni talli
yallamaṁmaṁgārikiṁnni taṁḍrivaṁśaṁ yēḍu tarālavārikiṁni tallivaṁ
śaṁ yēḍutarālavārikiṁnni puṁṇyaṁgānu dāmarlla ceruvukiṁdi peḍa
tala ceruvuku payikaṭṭanu Āceruvuku paḍamaṭanu bādari ceruvukuṁnnu pa
yikaṭṭanu reḍḍicerllanu vūrimuṁdari ceruvuga payikaṭṭanu kalujuṁnnu
reḍicarllaku tūrpuna tamapēranu kottagā gaṭiṁccina ceruvuṁnnu yīreṁ
ḍu grāmāla ceruvuluṁnnu Ācaṁdrārkastāyigānu kaṭṭiṁstimiganka
reḍḍicarlla komaravōlu yīreṁḍu grāmālānu yīceruvula kiṁ
danu cellivaccē dēva brāṁhmaṇa stāna māṁnyālu varimaḷlu vikṛti saṁ
vatsara Āṣāḍa ba 30 maṁgaḷavāraṁ padahāru ghaḍiyalu Āmīṁda pā
ḍyamī Amāvāsyanaṁdu sūryagrahaṇa puṁṇyakālamaṁdu sarvāmāṁnya
lugānu tama pituru pitāmaha prapitāmahulaku puṁṇyaṁ
bugānu sahiraṁṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakaṁbugānu trikaraṇa
śuddhigānu trivācakaṁgānu yīpuṁṇyakālamaṁddu dhāravōśiyisti
mi ganaka yīreṁḍugrāmāla ceruvulakiṁddi dēva brāṁhmaṇastānamāṁ
nyālavāru sarvamāṁnyālagānu dāravōśina varimaḷlu mī putra pautra pārā
paryaṁgānu Ācaṁdrārkastāyigānu sarvamānyaṁgānu Anubhaviṁci bratikēdi
yī ceruvulakiṁdi mānyālaku munupu tanivivaccē bēḍigelu rokhadhāṁnyālu maṁniṁci dāra
vōśi yistimi ganaka yī sarvamānyālugā dhāravōśina varimaḷlaku yavvaru ganaka Ācēdanalu
śēśi kīḍu talaṁcina vāṁḍu gaṁgakarta gōbrāhmaṁni vadhiṁcina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru tama ta
llidaṁḍṟla vadhiṁccina pāpāna bōvuvāru brahmatya śiśuhatyaṁ jēśina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāṁḍu .
madvaṁśajā paramahīpati vaṁśajā vā . yē mānavā satatamujvala dhaṁrmmacittā . madharārmamē
paripālanamācaraṁti . tatpādukadvayamahaṁ śirasāvahaṁti . 19 nadviṁkulaṁ ciṁnataṭāka
kūpaṁ bhibhatva rājyaṁ śaraṇāgataṁca . gōbrāṁhmaṇaṁ dēvagṛhālayaṁccayōddaripū
ceturguṇaṁcca . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī śrī jēyūnū
Digital edition of SII 33.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
